jobDescription: You will love this job! Roblox is defining the next-generation in entertainment and gaming, with 90 million monthly active users.  Work with the most passionate, visionary, and crazy-smart people you’ll ever meet. Fun place to work. Incredible opportunity for the right person. At the Front Desk, you may be the first face at Roblox that people see. So, you are SUPER IMPORTANT!  Location: San Mateo, California  Title/ Salary: Negotiable for the right person  Who you are: People Person. The ability to make our community, partners, adults, kids, Board Members, employees, etc. feel like that are truly welcomed at Roblox. ( Because they are!) Very smart. Intelligence is a good thing. We appreciate it. And you will be appreciated for it. Really nice. Our team is. You need to be as well. A good sense of humor is a major plus. Excited. You have the potential to be part of a company that is truly redefining entertainment. Some cool things you will do: Create a welcoming presence. Act in concierge capacity for assisting in answering questions from visitors and employees. Lead lobby tours for candidates, visitors and Roblox fans. Partner with other groups to help Roblox's employee and office needs.  You'll Love: Excellent medical, dental, and vision coverage A rewarding 401k program Flexible vacation policy Free catered lunches five times a week and several fully stocked kitchens with unlimited snacks Onsite fitness center and fitness program credit Annual Cal Train Go Pass
